title: Hexoo's Alterite
description: Makes netherite items more colorful and dynamic
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7cf24f509e32d9a9118cd2fdeb1331696144016.png)

### The resource pack is not too contrived, it just adds alternative textures for hobbyists

# **What's included in the RP?**
 - Updated texture of the neserite ingot and block.
 - Neserite tools.
 - Ancient debris and neserite crowbars!

# **What will happen in the future?**
 - New armor textures.
 - Updated armor models.
 - and much more!

_I hope you like it. Play with pleasure!_
